name: Peach Sour Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the sour cream, grated orange peel, brown sugar, and salt in a bowl until smooth.
2. Stir in the beaten egg yolks.
3. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of flour evenly over the bottom of the pie shell.
4. Pour in the sliced peaches.
5. Sprinkle the remaining flour evenly over the peaches.
6. Pour the sour cream mixture evenly over the top.
7. Bake at 425 degrees F for 15 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to 350 degrees F and bake an additional 30 minutes, or until set.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving.
